name: Testes

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - "**"
      - "!main"
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  unit_integration:
    name: Testes unitários e integração
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout do Código
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Configurar Node.js (v22)
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: "npm"

      - name: Instalar Dependências
        run: npm ci

      - name: Executar testes unitários e integração

        env:
          API_URL: http://localhost:3001
          ACCESS_TOKEN_COOKIE_NAME: access-token
          ACCESS_TOKEN_EXP: 900
          REFRESH_TOKEN_COOKIE_NAME: refresh-token
          REFRESH_TOKEN_EXP: 900

        run: npm run test
